title: FCMPASS - Creating a cytometer database and datasets
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"alu0l","text":"This protocol outlines the steps required to create flow cytometer databases and datasets using the FCMPASS software. This is one of a number of protocols in the pipeline for performing small particle calibration using the fcmpass software package.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Click the ‘+’ icon next to ‘Cytometer IDs’ list and enter a unique name to identify a instrument.
Select the relevant cytometer ID to add the dataset to
Click the ‘+’ icon next to the ‘Datasets’ list.

In the window enter the acquisition date of the calibration data and the dataset/experiment name. If there are any notes related to the experiment that are beneficial, they can be entered in the ‘Dataset Notes’ field.
creator: Jennifer Jones
